meta.name: Agent Switchboard Terminal
meta.description: A compact, status-first terminal interface for switching Agent providers and synchronizing CC Switch state.
source_references: User brief: Agent configuration switching and synchronization are the primary jobs

primary.role: focus, selected workspace, and primary action

neutral.usage: Terminal background, subdued borders, secondary text, and primary text

color.contrast_strategy: High-contrast foreground with muted structural chrome; color is reserved for state and focus

typography.font_style_notes: Use weight and color, never simulated font-size, to express hierarchy in a terminal

spacing.section_rhythm: One-cell internal padding; blank lines only inside detail panes where they improve scanning

layout.grid_system: Responsive Ratatui constraints with a persistent status header and contextual footer
layout.columns: Wide: provider list plus details; medium: one primary pane plus status rail; narrow: one focused pane

shape.border_usage: Subtle single-line borders on major work areas; selected rows use a filled marker rather than extra boxes
shape.divider_style: Single terminal rule with muted color

elevation.depth_cues: Color intensity, border emphasis, and spatial grouping

iconography.style: single-cell Unicode status glyphs with ASCII-safe text labels

motion.exit_pattern: Immediate redraw; active operations require cancellation

components.button_style: Key hints formatted as highlighted key plus plain-language action
components.input_style: Existing wizard fields retained with focused border and explicit validation
components.card_style: Bordered terminal panes with short uppercase-like titles and state badges
components.navigation_pattern: Four numbered jobs: Switch, Sync, Skills, Activity; Agents are a horizontal workspace selector
components.modal_style: Full-context wizard overlay with preserved terminal state
components.list_style: One-line rows, leading selection marker, trailing state badge, stable column alignment
components.component_notes: Keep the current provider and default sync source visible in the header; put destructive or long-running state in the status line

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: A compact switchboard for routing Agent configurations

visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: Current Agent/provider and sync readiness carry the most weight
visual_language.focal_strategy: One primary job per screen with persistent global status

composition.flow_direction: top status to workspace selector to actionable list to contextual help
composition.grouping_strategy: Group by user job, then Agent, then provider/source
composition.negative_space_role: Separates state summaries from actionable rows

imagery.graphic_elements: status glyphs, rules, and progress bars

interaction_feel.feedback_style: Immediate focus/state change with activity-log confirmation for operations
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: not applicable; keyboard focus is explicit
interaction_feel.loading_style: Live stage, elapsed time, artifact progress, and cancellable working badge

brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: Explain the missing prerequisite and name the next key to press
brand_voice_in_ui.error_tone: Specific, recoverable, and free of blame

overview.fallback_strategy: Use ASCII-compatible labels when Unicode glyph width is unreliable

text_effects.description: Only state-driven color and weight changes

cursor_effects.description: Terminal cursor is hidden while the TUI is active

visual_effects.composite_notes: Terminal effects are intentionally limited to focus color, semantic status glyphs, progress redraws, and operation state. There are no decorative loops or time-based animations.
